no_changes_rationale:
status: open
reason: Project verification is blocked by pre-existing out-of-scope clippy failures. The requested contract document was drafted at docs/helix/03-test/consumer-workload-gate.md and the bead acceptance commands pass, along with cargo check, cargo test, and cargo fmt --check. However, cargo clippy -- -D warnings fails in crates/axon-core/src/auth.rs and crates/axon-core/src/guardrails.rs with clippy::result_large_err on Result<(), AxonError>. Those files are outside this bead's named scope, and the execution instructions forbid committing while the required lint gate is red.
